title: astragalus xiphoides
intro: Astragalus xiphoides, also known as the Chinese milkvetch, is a perennial plant that belongs to the legume family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough and asthma symptoms, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus xiphoides is often prepared as a decoction or powder, and can also be consumed as a tea or supplement, making it a valuable addition to herbal medicine.
